name: no-stepper-component
description: No stepper/wizard component exists in the codebase. shadcn/ui components available: button, card, input, label, badge, separator. Will need to create a SkillCycleStepper component for navigating discovery → analysis → classification → design → spec → implementation phases.
recommendation: Create SkillCycleStepper component using tailwind + existing shadcn patterns. Reference session.status to determine current step.
